modules/cache/cache_util.h

9 *
10 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
11 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
12 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
13 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
14 * limitations under the License.
15 */
16
17/**
18 * @file cache_util.h
19 * @brief Cache Storage Functions
20 *
21 * @defgroup Cache_util  Cache Utility Functions
22 * @ingroup  MOD_CACHE
23 * @{
24 */ view japanese
25
26#ifndef CACHE_UTIL_H
27#define CACHE_UTIL_H
28
29#ifdef __cplusplus
30extern "C" {
31#endif
32
33#include "mod_cache.h"
34
35#include "apr_hooks.h"
36#include "apr.h"
37#include "apr_lib.h"
38#include "apr_strings.h"
39#include "apr_buckets.h"
40#include "apr_md5.h"
41#include "apr_pools.h"
42#include "apr_strings.h"
43#include "apr_optional.h"
44#define APR_WANT_STRFUNC
45#include "apr_want.h"
46
47#include "httpd.h"
48#include "http_config.h"
49#include "ap_config.h"
50#include "http_core.h"
51#include "http_protocol.h"
52#include "http_request.h"
53#include "http_vhost.h"
54#include "http_main.h"
55#include "http_log.h"
56#include "http_connection.h"
57#include "util_filter.h"
58#include "apr_uri.h"
59
60#ifdef HAVE_NETDB_H
61#include <netdb.h>
62#endif
63
64#ifdef HAVE_SYS_SOCKET_H
65#include <sys/socket.h>
66#endif
67
68#ifdef HAVE_NETINET_IN_H
69#include <netinet/in.h>
70#endif
71
72#ifdef HAVE_ARPA_INET_H
73#include <arpa/inet.h>
74#endif
75
76#include "apr_atomic.h"
77
78#ifndef MAX
79#define MAX(a,b)                ((a) > (b) ? (a) : (b))
80#endif
81#ifndef MIN
82#define MIN(a,b)                ((a) < (b) ? (a) : (b))
83#endif
84
85#define MSEC_ONE_DAY    ((apr_time_t)(86400*APR_USEC_PER_SEC)) /* one day, in microseconds */ view japanese
86#define MSEC_ONE_HR     ((apr_time_t)(3600*APR_USEC_PER_SEC))  /* one hour, in microseconds */ view japanese
87#define MSEC_ONE_MIN    ((apr_time_t)(60*APR_USEC_PER_SEC))    /* one minute, in microseconds */ view japanese
88#define MSEC_ONE_SEC    ((apr_time_t)(APR_USEC_PER_SEC))       /* one second, in microseconds */ view japanese
89
90#define DEFAULT_CACHE_MAXEXPIRE MSEC_ONE_DAY
91#define DEFAULT_CACHE_MINEXPIRE 0
92#define DEFAULT_CACHE_EXPIRE    MSEC_ONE_HR
93#define DEFAULT_CACHE_LMFACTOR  (0.1)
94#define DEFAULT_CACHE_MAXAGE    5
95#define DEFAULT_X_CACHE         0
96#define DEFAULT_X_CACHE_DETAIL  0
97#define DEFAULT_CACHE_STALE_ON_ERROR 1
98#define DEFAULT_CACHE_LOCKPATH "/mod_cache-lock"
99#define CACHE_LOCKNAME_KEY "mod_cache-lockname"
100#define CACHE_LOCKFILE_KEY "mod_cache-lockfile"
101#define CACHE_CTX_KEY "mod_cache-ctx"
102#define CACHE_SEPARATOR ", \t"
103
104/**
105 * cache_util.c
106 */ view japanese
107
108struct cache_enable {
109    apr_uri_t url;
110    const char *type;
111    apr_size_t pathlen;
112};
113
114struct cache_disable {
115    apr_uri_t url;
116    apr_size_t pathlen;
117};
118
119/* static information about the local cache */ view japanese
120typedef struct {
121    apr_array_header_t *cacheenable;    /* URLs to cache */ view japanese
122    apr_array_header_t *cachedisable;   /* URLs not to cache */ view japanese
123    /** store the headers that should not be stored in the cache */ view japanese
124    apr_array_header_t *ignore_headers;
125    /** store the identifiers that should not be used for key calculation */ view japanese
126    apr_array_header_t *ignore_session_id;
127    const char *lockpath;
128    apr_time_t lockmaxage;
129    apr_uri_t *base_uri;
130    /** ignore client's requests for uncached responses */ view japanese
131    unsigned int ignorecachecontrol:1;
132    /** ignore query-string when caching */ view japanese
133    unsigned int ignorequerystring:1;
134    /** run within the quick handler */ view japanese
135    unsigned int quick:1;
136    /* thundering herd lock */ view japanese
137    unsigned int lock:1;
138    unsigned int x_cache:1;
139    unsigned int x_cache_detail:1;
140    /* flag if CacheIgnoreHeader has been set */ view japanese
141    #define CACHE_IGNORE_HEADERS_SET   1
142    #define CACHE_IGNORE_HEADERS_UNSET 0
143    unsigned int ignore_headers_set:1;
144    /* flag if CacheIgnoreURLSessionIdentifiers has been set */ view japanese
145    #define CACHE_IGNORE_SESSION_ID_SET   1
146    #define CACHE_IGNORE_SESSION_ID_UNSET 0
147    unsigned int ignore_session_id_set:1;
148    unsigned int base_uri_set:1;
149    unsigned int ignorecachecontrol_set:1;
150    unsigned int ignorequerystring_set:1;
151    unsigned int quick_set:1;
152    unsigned int lock_set:1;
153    unsigned int lockpath_set:1;
154    unsigned int lockmaxage_set:1;
155    unsigned int x_cache_set:1;
156    unsigned int x_cache_detail_set:1;
157} cache_server_conf;
158
159typedef struct {
160    /* Minimum time to keep cached files in msecs */ view japanese
161    apr_time_t minex;
162    /* Maximum time to keep cached files in msecs */ view japanese
163    apr_time_t maxex;
164    /* default time to keep cached file in msecs */ view japanese
165    apr_time_t defex;
166    /* factor for estimating expires date */ view japanese
167    double factor;
168    /* cache enabled for this location */ view japanese
169    apr_array_header_t *cacheenable;
170    /* cache disabled for this location */ view japanese
171    unsigned int disable:1;
172    /* set X-Cache headers */ view japanese
173    unsigned int x_cache:1;
174    unsigned int x_cache_detail:1;
175    /* serve stale on error */ view japanese
176    unsigned int stale_on_error:1;
177    /** ignore the last-modified header when deciding to cache this request */ view japanese
178    unsigned int no_last_mod_ignore:1;
179    /** ignore expiration date from server */ view japanese
180    unsigned int store_expired:1;
181    /** ignore Cache-Control: private header from server */ view japanese
182    unsigned int store_private:1;
183    /** ignore Cache-Control: no-store header from client or server */ view japanese
184    unsigned int store_nostore:1;
185    unsigned int minex_set:1;
186    unsigned int maxex_set:1;
187    unsigned int defex_set:1;
188    unsigned int factor_set:1;
189    unsigned int x_cache_set:1;
190    unsigned int x_cache_detail_set:1;
191    unsigned int stale_on_error_set:1;
192    unsigned int no_last_mod_ignore_set:1;
193    unsigned int store_expired_set:1;
194    unsigned int store_private_set:1;
195    unsigned int store_nostore_set:1;
196    unsigned int enable_set:1;
197    unsigned int disable_set:1;
198} cache_dir_conf;
199
200/* A linked-list of authn providers. */ view japanese
201typedef struct cache_provider_list cache_provider_list;
202
203struct cache_provider_list {
204    const char *provider_name;
205    const cache_provider *provider;
206    cache_provider_list *next;
207};
208
209/* per request cache information */ view japanese
210typedef struct {
211    cache_provider_list *providers;     /* possible cache providers */ view japanese
212    const cache_provider *provider;     /* current cache provider */ view japanese
213    const char *provider_name;          /* current cache provider name */ view japanese
214    int fresh;                          /* is the entity fresh? */ view japanese
215    cache_handle_t *handle;             /* current cache handle */ view japanese
216    cache_handle_t *stale_handle;       /* stale cache handle */ view japanese
217    apr_table_t *stale_headers;         /* original request headers. */ view japanese
218    int in_checked;                     /* CACHE_SAVE must cache the entity */ view japanese
219    int block_response;                 /* CACHE_SAVE must block response. */ view japanese
220    apr_bucket_brigade *saved_brigade;  /* copy of partial response */ view japanese
221    apr_off_t saved_size;               /* length of saved_brigade */ view japanese
222    apr_time_t exp;                     /* expiration */ view japanese
223    apr_time_t lastmod;                 /* last-modified time */ view japanese
224    cache_info *info;                   /* current cache info */ view japanese
225    ap_filter_t *save_filter;           /* Enable us to restore the filter on error */ view japanese
226    ap_filter_t *remove_url_filter;     /* Enable us to remove the filter */ view japanese
227    const char *key;                    /* The cache key created for this
228                                         * request
229                                         */ view japanese
230    apr_off_t size;                     /* the content length from the headers, or -1 */ view japanese
231    apr_bucket_brigade *out;            /* brigade to reuse for upstream responses */ view japanese
232    cache_control_t control_in;         /* cache control incoming */ view japanese
233} cache_request_rec;
234
235/**
236 * Check the whether the request allows a cached object to be served as per RFC2616
237 * section 14.9.4 (Cache Revalidation and Reload Controls)
238 * @param cache cache_request_rec
239 * @param r request_rec
240 * @return 0 ==> cache object may not be served, 1 ==> cache object may be served
241 */ view japanese
242int ap_cache_check_no_cache(cache_request_rec *cache, request_rec *r);
243
244/**
245 * Check the whether the request allows a cached object to be stored as per RFC2616
246 * section 14.9.2 (What May be Stored by Caches)
247 * @param cache cache_request_rec
248 * @param r request_rec
249 * @return 0 ==> cache object may not be served, 1 ==> cache object may be served
250 */ view japanese
251int ap_cache_check_no_store(cache_request_rec *cache, request_rec *r);
252
253/**
254 * Check the freshness of the cache object per RFC2616 section 13.2 (Expiration Model)
255 * @param h cache_handle_t
256 * @param cache cache_request_rec
257 * @param r request_rec
258 * @return 0 ==> cache object is stale, 1 ==> cache object is fresh
259 */ view japanese
260int cache_check_freshness(cache_handle_t *h, cache_request_rec *cache,
261        request_rec *r);
262
263/**
264 * Try obtain a cache wide lock on the given cache key.
265 *
266 * If we return APR_SUCCESS, we obtained the lock, and we are clear to
267 * proceed to the backend. If we return APR_EEXISTS, then the lock is
268 * already locked, someone else has gone to refresh the backend data
269 * already, so we must return stale data with a warning in the mean
270 * time. If we return anything else, then something has gone pear
271 * shaped, and we allow the request through to the backend regardless.
272 *
273 * This lock is created from the request pool, meaning that should
274 * something go wrong and the lock isn't deleted on return of the
275 * request headers from the backend for whatever reason, at worst the
276 * lock will be cleaned up when the request is dies or finishes.
277 *
278 * If something goes truly bananas and the lock isn't deleted when the
279 * request dies, the lock will be trashed when its max-age is reached,
280 * or when a request arrives containing a Cache-Control: no-cache. At
281 * no point is it possible for this lock to permanently deny access to
282 * the backend.
283 */ view japanese
284apr_status_t cache_try_lock(cache_server_conf *conf, cache_request_rec *cache,
285        request_rec *r);
286
287/**
288 * Remove the cache lock, if present.
289 *
290 * First, try to close the file handle, whose delete-on-close should
291 * kill the file. Otherwise, just delete the file by name.
292 *
293 * If no lock name has yet been calculated, do the calculation of the
294 * lock name first before trying to delete the file.
295 *
296 * If an optional bucket brigade is passed, the lock will only be
297 * removed if the bucket brigade contains an EOS bucket.
298 */ view japanese
299apr_status_t cache_remove_lock(cache_server_conf *conf,
300        cache_request_rec *cache, request_rec *r, apr_bucket_brigade *bb);
301
302cache_provider_list *cache_get_providers(request_rec *r,
303                                         cache_server_conf *conf);
304
305/**
306 * Get a value from a table, where the table may contain multiple
307 * values for a given key.
308 *
309 * When the table contains a single value, that value is returned
310 * unchanged.
311 *
312 * When the table contains two or more values for a key, all values
313 * for the key are returned, separated by commas.
314 */ view japanese
315const char *cache_table_getm(apr_pool_t *p, const apr_table_t *t,
316        const char *key);
317
318/**
319 * String tokenizer that ignores separator characters within quoted strings
320 * and escaped characters, as per RFC2616 section 2.2.
321 */ view japanese
322char *cache_strqtok(char *str, const char *sep, char **last);
323
324/**
325 * Merge err_headers_out into headers_out and add request's Content-Type and
326 * Content-Encoding if available.
327 */ view japanese
328apr_table_t *cache_merge_headers_out(request_rec *r);
329
330/**
331 * Return whether to use request's path/query from early stage (r->parsed_uri)
332 * or the current/rewritable ones (r->uri/r->args).
333 */ view japanese
334int cache_use_early_url(request_rec *r);
335
336#ifdef __cplusplus
337}
338#endif
339
340#endif /* !CACHE_UTIL_H */ view japanese
341/** @} */ view japanese

Japanese translation

modules/cache/cache_util.h:17-24

/**
 * @file cache_util.h
 * @brief キャッシュストレージ関数
 *
 * @defgroup Cache_util  キャッシュユーティリティ関数
 * @ingroup  MOD_CACHE
 * @{
 */

Original comment

/**
 * @file cache_util.h
 * @brief Cache Storage Functions
 *
 * @defgroup Cache_util  Cache Utility Functions
 * @ingroup  MOD_CACHE
 * @{
 */

Japanese translation

/* 1日（マイクロ秒単位） */

Original comment

/* one day, in microseconds */

Japanese translation

Original comment

/* one hour, in microseconds */

Original comment

/* one minute, in microseconds */

Japanese translation

/* 1秒（マイクロ秒単位） */

Original comment

/* one second, in microseconds */

 */

 */

Japanese translation

modules/cache/cache_util.h:235-241

/**
 * RFC2616 セクション 14.9.4 (Cache Revalidation and Reload Controls) に基づき、
 * リクエストがキャッシュオブジェクトの提供を許可しているかどうかを確認する
 * @param cache cache_request_rec
 * @param r request_rec
 * @return 0 ==> キャッシュオブジェクトを提供不可, 1 ==> キャッシュオブジェクトを提供可能
 */

Original comment

/**
 * Check the whether the request allows a cached object to be served as per RFC2616
 * section 14.9.4 (Cache Revalidation and Reload Controls)
 * @param cache cache_request_rec
 * @param r request_rec
 * @return 0 ==> cache object may not be served, 1 ==> cache object may be served
 */

Japanese translation

modules/cache/cache_util.h:244-250

/**
 * RFC2616 セクション 14.9.2 (What May be Stored by Caches) に基づき、
 * リクエストがキャッシュオブジェクトの保存を許可しているかどうかを確認する
 * @param cache cache_request_rec
 * @param r request_rec
 * @return 0 ==> キャッシュオブジェクトを提供不可, 1 ==> キャッシュオブジェクトを提供可
 */

Original comment

/**
 * Check the whether the request allows a cached object to be stored as per RFC2616
 * section 14.9.2 (What May be Stored by Caches)
 * @param cache cache_request_rec
 * @param r request_rec
 * @return 0 ==> cache object may not be served, 1 ==> cache object may be served
 */

Japanese translation

modules/cache/cache_util.h:253-259

/**
 * RFC2616 セクション 13.2 (有効期限モデル) に基づき、キャッシュオブジェクトの鮮度を確認する
 * @param h cache_handle_t
 * @param cache cache_request_rec
 * @param r request_rec
 * @return 0 ==> キャッシュオブジェクトは期限切れ、1 ==> キャッシュオブジェクトは最新
 */

Original comment

/**
 * Check the freshness of the cache object per RFC2616 section 13.2 (Expiration Model)
 * @param h cache_handle_t
 * @param cache cache_request_rec
 * @param r request_rec
 * @return 0 ==> cache object is stale, 1 ==> cache object is fresh
 */

Japanese translation

modules/cache/cache_util.h:263-283

/**
 * 指定されたキャッシュキーに対して、キャッシュ全体のロック取得を試みます。
 *
 * APR_SUCCESS が返された場合、ロックは取得済みであり、バックエンドへ進んで問題ありません。
 * APR_EEXISTS が返された場合、すでにロックされており、他の誰かがすでにバックエンドデータの更新を行っているため、その間は警告付きで古いデータを返す必要があります。
 * それ以外の値が返された場合、何らかの異常が発生したことを意味し、その場合はバックエンドへのリクエストを許可します。
 *
 * このロックはリクエストプールから作成されます。つまり、何らかの理由でバックエンドからリクエストヘッダーが返される際にロックが削除されなかったとしても、最悪の場合でもリクエストが終了または消滅した時点でロックはクリーンアップされます。
 *
 * 万が一、リクエスト終了時にロックが削除されないという異常事態が発生しても、そのロックは最大有効期間（max-age）に達した際、あるいは Cache-Control: no-cache を含むリクエストが到着した際に破棄されます。
 * いかなる状況においても、このロックがバックエンドへのアクセスを永続的に拒否することはありません。
 */

Original comment

/**
 * Try obtain a cache wide lock on the given cache key.
 *
 * If we return APR_SUCCESS, we obtained the lock, and we are clear to
 * proceed to the backend. If we return APR_EEXISTS, then the lock is
 * already locked, someone else has gone to refresh the backend data
 * already, so we must return stale data with a warning in the mean
 * time. If we return anything else, then something has gone pear
 * shaped, and we allow the request through to the backend regardless.
 *
 * This lock is created from the request pool, meaning that should
 * something go wrong and the lock isn't deleted on return of the
 * request headers from the backend for whatever reason, at worst the
 * lock will be cleaned up when the request is dies or finishes.
 *
 * If something goes truly bananas and the lock isn't deleted when the
 * request dies, the lock will be trashed when its max-age is reached,
 * or when a request arrives containing a Cache-Control: no-cache. At
 * no point is it possible for this lock to permanently deny access to
 * the backend.
 */

Japanese translation

modules/cache/cache_util.h:287-298

/**
 * キャッシュロックが存在する場合は削除します。
 *
 * まず、ファイルハンドルを閉じます。クローズ時に削除される設定であれば、ファイルは破棄されます。
 * そうでない場合は、ファイル名で直接削除します。
 *
 * ロック名がまだ計算されていない場合は、ファイルを削除する前にロック名の計算を行います。
 *
 * オプションのバケットブリゲードが渡された場合、そのバケットブリゲードにEOSバケットが含まれているときのみ、ロックが削除されます。
 */

Original comment

/**
 * Remove the cache lock, if present.
 *
 * First, try to close the file handle, whose delete-on-close should
 * kill the file. Otherwise, just delete the file by name.
 *
 * If no lock name has yet been calculated, do the calculation of the
 * lock name first before trying to delete the file.
 *
 * If an optional bucket brigade is passed, the lock will only be
 * removed if the bucket brigade contains an EOS bucket.
 */

Japanese translation

modules/cache/cache_util.h:305-314

/**
 * テーブルから値を取得します。テーブルには特定のキーに対して複数の値が含まれている場合があります。
 *
 * テーブルに値が1つだけ含まれている場合は、その値がそのまま返されます。
 *
 * テーブルにキーに対して2つ以上の値が含まれている場合は、すべての値がカンマ区切りで返されます。
 */

Original comment

/**
 * Get a value from a table, where the table may contain multiple
 * values for a given key.
 *
 * When the table contains a single value, that value is returned
 * unchanged.
 *
 * When the table contains two or more values for a key, all values
 * for the key are returned, separated by commas.
 */

Japanese translation

modules/cache/cache_util.h:318-321

/**
 * RFC2616 セクション 2.2 に準拠し、引用符で囲まれた文字列内およびエスケープされた文字内の区切り文字を無視する文字列トークナイザー。
 */

Original comment

/**
 * String tokenizer that ignores separator characters within quoted strings
 * and escaped characters, as per RFC2616 section 2.2.
 */

Japanese translation

modules/cache/cache_util.h:324-327

/**
 * err_headers_out を headers_out にマージし、利用可能な場合はリクエストの Content-Type および Content-Encoding を追加します。
 */

Original comment

/**
 * Merge err_headers_out into headers_out and add request's Content-Type and
 * Content-Encoding if available.
 */

Japanese translation

modules/cache/cache_util.h:330-333

/**
 * リクエストの初期段階のパス/クエリ (r->parsed_uri) を使用するか、
 * 現在の書き換え可能なもの (r->uri/r->args) を使用するかを返します。
 */

Original comment

/**
 * Return whether to use request's path/query from early stage (r->parsed_uri)
 * or the current/rewritable ones (r->uri/r->args).
 */

Japanese translation

modules/cache/cache_util.h:340

/* !CACHE_UTIL_H */

Original comment

/* !CACHE_UTIL_H */

Japanese translation

modules/cache/cache_util.h:341

Original comment
